title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 17 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 17 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 17 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/03/2026
Today， DCE iron ore futures generally strengthened today. The most-traded contract I2605 finally closed at816.5 yuan/mt, up 1.81% from the previous trading session. Meanwhile, the spot price rose by about 5 yuan from the previous trading day.
